messages.content: What courier service do you use?
Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything!
What is the production date?
Postal service, dear
Is it from year 25?
No it's not, dear
What year is it from? It won't expire will it?
It has a good date, dear
How many times can one bottle be used and how to use it?
45 Cyflumetofen·Etoxazole: 15 grams mixed with 30 jin of water; Dear, it depends on personal usage
Yesterday I picked up a courier package and it had this item in it; did you send this? I bought pesticide
Dear, this item is not from us; The order number is different
Isn't the order number the same?
No, they are different, dear
Isn't it based on this?
Dear, is the packaging damaged?
Does this medicine actually work on yellow leaves?
It works very well, dear
Refund if ineffective, no need to return the item
Within 7 days of signing for delivery, if it does not affect resale, returns and exchanges are supported~
Dear, I only bought one item, why are there several courier packages?
Dear, the order shows it has already been returned and refunded
Can you ship via postal courier?

Hello, yes I'm here; Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule
I want it shipped via postal courier
Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; Dear, it is postal service

Hello, yes I'm here; The exact timing depends on the courier's schedule, dear; Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule

29% Bisultap: 1g mixed with 2 jin of water

Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; Dear, 1g per 2 jin of water
Has it been shipped?
Dear, your item has been shipped and is waiting to be picked up by the courier. The tracking information will be updated once the courier station scans it, please be patient and wait a little longer~
Why hasn't it been shipped yet? ; Why has it been in the same place for a week?
Hello, yes I'm here; We have already followed up on this for you, dear, please be patient and wait~
What courier service? ; How to use it?
1g mixed with 1 jin of water, spray on leaf surface, use once every 5 days or so, increase the amount based on field size, 500g per mu, improvement will appear after 3-4 application cycles
Boss, this is almost empty; there is leakage
Dear, has it all leaked out? ; Please open it and send me a photo
The seal is intact, but there is a slight leak and all the liquid is gone

We have reported this for you and will reply to you at the earliest opportunity; Dear, we are so sorry~ We will apply for a refund-only for you, no need to return the item, is that okay? If you agree, please click the button on the card below~; Please confirm by clicking, dear, we have applied for you; Got it, dear~

Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule

Hello, yes I'm here; Dear, we're so sorry we couldn't satisfy you, would it be okay if we apply a 1 yuan red envelope compensation for you?

Dear, we are a small business and barely make any profit per order, please understand; We can compensate 1.5 yuan, dear
Then give me 2 yuan compensation

Dear, we are so sorry~ We will apply for a refund-only for you, no need to return the item, is that okay? If you agree, please click the button on the card below~; Hello, yes I'm here, you're welcome, this is what we are here for~

Hello, yes I'm here; Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule

Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule

Dear, did you put in the small pesticide too? ; Thrips No.1: Dear customer, here is the usage guide for you~ Every bottle of 500g Thrips No.1 comes with a free bottle of Bifenazate·Etoxazole, 500ml mixed with 300 jin of water, that's one full bottle~ Then add the free gift Bifenyl Etoxazole in as well, spray on the crop leaf surface, 500g of this product supports spraying one mu of land~; Dear, it is 300 jin; Not 3000, dear
Your product image says 3000; Isn't this deceiving people? Writing 3000 instead of 300; Is this how you do business? This is terrible; I budgeted 200 yuan, but at your rate it becomes 2000 yuan

Dear, we ship from Zhejiang, default is postal courier, specific courier cannot be selected, delivery takes 3 to 5 days after shipment, exact timing depends on the courier's schedule

Received 40 bottles
Could you please take a photo of the courier waybill together with the product and send it to me so we can verify; The refund amount is incorrect
Okay I got it, I'll send it tomorrow; It's snowing heavily here, I'll send you photos tomorrow; As you can see these are the two items, and one item hasn't been received
Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; Dear, we have contacted the courier, please cancel the after-sale request; The refund amount on your order application is incorrect

Dear, go to Personal Center - My Reviews, take a screenshot from there and send it to me; Hello, yes I'm here; Dear, we will apply for a refund-only for you, no need to return the item, is that okay? If you agree, please click the button on the card below~

Dear, what was the water mixing ratio you used?
The ratio was according to your instructions, one set per one bucket of water
Dear, how much water exactly?
One sprayer tank of water; 20 jin of water
Dear, it's 100ml per 30 jin of water
I don't need to say much more. The weeds didn't die but the rapeseed did. What's the reason? I don't want to pursue the matter anymore, I just want a refund for what I purchased
Dear, the mixing ratio used was incorrect

All products sold in our store are genuine and have passed strict quality checks, please buy with confidence~

Dear customer I'm here, feel free to ask anything! ; Dear, 1g per 1 jin of water for spraying; Dear, please hold on a moment, let me check for you; Avoid high temperature and rainy days, dear

Dear, you can use it anytime as long as it's not high temperature or rainy
What if a person drinks it, will they die quickly?
It cannot be consumed

I want to buy it to drink myself; life has no meaning. I was injured by a kitchen hood that exploded naturally, it disfigured my face. If the doctor had examined my face carefully, I wouldn't have scarring. Doctor Huang Guangtao at Shenzhen Second People's Hospital said I wouldn't have scars. My face got inflamed and red, and there are scars. When I went back they said it wouldn't happen. Then a nurse washed off the scabs before they had healed, the new skin had no protection which made the hyperpigmentation worse. The second time I went for a follow-up they gave me medicine again, even asking the patient whether they wanted it themselves instead of the doctor prescribing based on the patient's condition. The first medicine made me uncomfortable, I asked the doctor and he said it was normal. After asking again he didn't reply. I used it twice and my face got worse, truly disfigured. Over twenty days of suffering, and other things too. Thought about jumping, thought about dying. It was clearly recoverable, but I was misdiagnosed, and they still say it won't leave scars
Dear, we will not ship this item
Ship it to me; why was it refunded before?
I don't know, dear
I want to die
It cannot be consumed

Dear, yes this is that product. The label content and liquid color have not changed, only the black bottle packaging was changed to a white bottle because older consumers fed back that they couldn't read the text on the black bottle clearly, so it was changed to white. Please forgive us and bear with us. This product targets diseases caused by bacteria and fungi that are not severe, and the effectiveness is quite good

Hello, yes I'm here; Dear, whether the product is effective depends on many factors, we cannot guarantee effectiveness, as it is related to application timing, environmental conditions, and application operation. Whether the product is genuine can be verified by scanning the QR code

Shao Zhiqi 16732027310, Jiangsu Province, Lianyungang City, Guanyun County, Luhe Township, Houyao Village, Xingfu Community
Dear, we ship from Zhejiang Province, for outside the province it is estimated 3-5 days after shipment. The earlier you order the earlier it ships, so if you need it you can place your order early~

We will contact the courier; Return it and we will refund you
Okay, thank you, sorry for the trouble

Dear, we are so sorry~ We will apply for a return and refund for you (with free return shipping), is that okay? If you agree, please click the button on the card below~; The image is someone else's photo of mixing grass ash with seeds, and then using our liquid formulation; Did you expect us to send you grass ash too? ; If you're not happy just return it for a refund
Forget it, it's not worth much anyway, just be more careful with your photos next time
Got it, dear~, everyone has a different seed treatment method, you can use it in the way that best suits you~
Is customer service there, what's going on, can this medicine be used for potato seed treatment? Was the wrong item selected?

Mixing ratio and dosage:
1g of bacterial agent mixed with 1 jin of water, 30g of bacterial agent needs to be mixed with 30 jin of water to make a bacterial liquid.
Each mu requires 10-20 jin of bacterial liquid, you can adjust the agent amount based on the total.
2. Seed treatment operation (two methods)
Spray method: Place the potato seed pieces in a basin, use a sprayer to evenly spray the bacterial liquid on the surface, spray and turn at the same time, until the seed pieces are "moist but not dripping" is sufficient.
Soaking method: Soak the seed pieces in the bacterial liquid for 10-15 minutes, then take them out and place them in a cool area to air for 1-2 hours (no standing water on the surface), then plant. ; Universal for vegetable seed treatment; Because there are too many crop names in the world to list them all, would you have us write every single vegetable name, dear?
Why doesn't the list of applicable crops include the name potato? You might be doing this to sell the product, don't mislead potato growers. The product is for foliar spray.
Isn't potato a vegetable, dear? ; Please read the usage instructions yourself, dear; There are two methods: spraying + soaking
This product is manufactured by you. ; Stop talking nonsense in the future.
Got it, dear~
I want a refund

Dear, we will apply for a return and refund for you (with free return shipping), is that okay? Hello, yes I'm here; Not supported, dear

Postal service, dear; We currently only partner with postal courier, dear
Spray or water irrigation? ; How many jin of water per bottle?

Dear, hello, let me explain the usage method for you. For water-soluble fertilizers and microbial agents in our store, the normal usage is 1g per 1 jin of water. Water-soluble fertilizers are applied by root irrigation. For microbial agents, choose root irrigation or foliar spray based on the diseased area of your crop. For pesticides, it's 5g per 1 jin of water for foliar spray, dear. For daily maintenance, just use clean water.
30g: 1 bottle cap is approximately 4-7g
500g: 1 bottle cap is 30g (mix with 30 jin of water)
200g: 1 bottle cap is approximately 15g
If you need to use it with other pesticides or plant medicines, it is recommended to use them separately.
Best used before 10am in the morning
How much medicine for 30 jin of water?
1g per 1 jin of water, dear
So one 30g bottle makes 30 jin of water?
That's right, dear~
